creator: jiashiun@gmail.com
text:
gnome-terminal failed compilation finding symbols from libICE after recent update.

Fix: looks similar to the problem described in ports/189015 for sysutils/brasero, and with minor change to the original patch reapplied to gnome-terminal, build succeeds.

patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: jsli@4cbsd:/usr/ports/x11/gnome-terminal.orig # time make -DBATCH
...
...
